attractions.name: Central Park
attractions.description: Famous park with carousel, playgrounds, row boat rides, Alice in Wonderland statue and Belvedere Castle

attractions.name: Times Square
attractions.description: Giant LED screens, M&M's World, Disney Store, and costumed characters

attractions.name: Bronx Zoo
attractions.description: Meet lions, gorillas, flamingos, and ride the Bug Carousel

attractions.name: Harry Potter and the Cursed Child
attractions.description: Broadway show experience for the whole family

attractions.name: Statue at Sunset Cruise
attractions.description: Circle Line cruise with close views of Statue of Liberty and NYC skyline at golden hour

attractions.name: Brooklyn Bridge
attractions.description: Walk across the bridge with sunset views and city lights, visit Dumbo's Pebble beach

attractions.name: LEGO Store
attractions.description: Play zones, giant models, and build-your-own kits

attractions.name: Rockefeller Plaza
attractions.description: Prometheus statue, Channel Gardens, and seasonal ice rink

attractions.name: Color Factory NYC
attractions.description: Interactive, artistic fun with bright rooms, secret treats, and photo ops for families

attractions.name: Harry Potter Store
attractions.description: Explore wand walls, house robes, and sip Butterbeer

attractions.name: SUMMIT One Vanderbilt
attractions.description: Multi-sensory observation deck with mirror rooms, immersive art, and sky-high views

attractions.name: Empire State Building
attractions.description: Observation decks on 86th and optional 102nd floor with incredible views

attractions.name: SPYSCAPE
attractions.description: Hands-on spy challenges, codebreaking, and laser maze fun ideal for older kids

attractions.name: Bryant Park
attractions.description: Live music, pop-up events, outdoor movies, or storytelling sessions in May

attractions.name: The High Line & Hudson Yards Vessel
attractions.description: Elevated park with city views, gardens, art installations, and futuristic honeycomb structure

attractions.name: Little Island (Pier 55)
attractions.description: Floating park with winding paths, lawns, and occasional live performances

attractions.name: Seaport District & Pier 17
attractions.description: Cobblestone streets, waterfront views, and pop-up activities with free outdoor concerts or markets

hotels.name: The Time New York - JDV by Hyatt

transport_options.description: Quickest and easiest with luggage from JFK Airport to hotel, takes about 1 hour
C/E line to 50th St with 10-minute walk to Circle Line Cruise Terminal, about 25 minutes to 9/11 Memorial
10-15 minutes between hotel and Central Park/Times Square, attractions in Midtown within 5-10 minutes
